ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trucks" (
  "truck_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each truck */,
  "fm_id" INTEGER /* Fleet Management ID associated with the truck */,
  "primary_fleet" TEXT /* Primary fleet to which the truck belongs */,
  "function_code" INTEGER /* Function code indicating the operational role of the truck */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* The official registration number of the truck */,
  "make" TEXT /* The make of the truck */,
  "model" TEXT /* The model of the truck */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* The year the truck was manufactured */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* The type of fuel the truck uses */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the truck */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* The current maintenance status of the truck */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance check */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* The ID of the driver assigned to the truck */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the fleet to which the truck belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("truck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trucks_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trucks_function_code FOREIGN KEY ("function_code") REFERENCES function_codes ("function_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric record */,
  "truck_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the truck this metric is associated with */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the financial metric was recorded */,
  "income" REAL /* Income generated by the truck on the specified date */,
  "contribution" REAL /* Contribution margin associated with the truck on the specified date */,
  "operational_cost" REAL /* The operational cost associated with the truck on the specified date */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* The net profit calculated from income and operational costs */,
  "cost_center" TEXT /* The cost center to which the financial metrics are attributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation record */,
  "truck_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the truck that performed the operation */,
  "kms" INTEGER /* Total kilometers driven by the truck in the operation */,
  "blackout_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the truck experienced any blackouts during the operation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the operation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the operation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the operation in minutes */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the task performed during the operation */,
  "fuel_consumed" REAL /* The amount of fuel consumed during the operation */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the operation took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fleet's purpose and operations */,
  "base_location" TEXT /* The base location of the fleet */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* The ID of the manager responsible for the fleet */,
  "total_trucks" INTEGER /* The total number of trucks in the fleet */,
  "total_km_driven" INTEGER /* The total kilometers driven by all trucks in the fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function code */,
  "function_code" INTEGER /* The function code itself */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function code's role within operations */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department to which the function code is associated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the function code is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)
